task_completion.description: Open DreamPlan and load the 'Sample House' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DreamPlan Home Design Software interface is open and a pre-built house model (Sample House/Contemporary House) is visible in the viewport.

task_completion.description: Navigate the camera to the backyard/outdoor area of the house.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D or 3D viewport is focused on the exterior area behind or around the house, showing the outdoor terrain.

task_completion.description: Place a 'Fire Pit' object in the backyard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A fire pit object (from the exterior/accessories catalog) is visible on the ground in the backyard area.

task_completion.description: Place at least two 'Outdoor Chairs' to create a conversation group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least two outdoor chairs are placed in close proximity to the fire pit, arranged facing it or each other to form a seating area.

task_completion.description: Save the project as 'FirePitProject.ndp' (or .ddp) in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or Windows File Explorer window showing the project file named 'FirePitProject.ndp' (or 'FirePitProject.ddp') saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\DreamPlan\'.
A save dialog or File Explorer window showing an image file named 'fire_pit_view.png' saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\DreamPlan\', or the agent using the software's screenshot/export function.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the DreamPlan GUI to complete the design.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through DreamPlan's menus, object catalogs, and viewport, rather than just running terminal commands to create dummy files.

integrity.description: The exported screenshot is a genuine 3D view from the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'fire_pit_view.png' image (if visible) or the viewport being captured clearly shows the low-poly/standard 3D rendering style of DreamPlan, not a photorealistic image downloaded from the internet.

integrity.description: The agent saved the files in the exact requested directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The address bar in the save dialogs or File Explorer explicitly shows 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\DreamPlan'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: DreamPlan Home Design Software is a real application by NCH Software. The task asks to save the project as 'FirePitProject.ndp', but DreamPlan's native format is '.ddp'. Accept either '.ndp' or '.ddp' as valid for the project save requirement. The final output requires a 3D view screenshot named 'fire_pit_view.png' showing a fire pit and at least two outdoor chairs in the backyard of the Sample House.
